CONTENT.Early life: Boulhendi was born in 2001 in France. He joined the youth academy of French Ligue 1 side Nice at the age of fifteeen.
CONTENT.Club career: Boulhendi started his career with Ligue 1 side Nice. He also played for the club's reserve team.
CONTENT.Personal life: Boulhendi is of Algerian and Italian descent.
CONTENT.Style of play: Boulhendi operates as a goalkeeper. He has been described as "athletic without being huge... explosive, gifted on his line".
CONTENT.International career: Boulhendi has represented Algeria internationally at youth level. He has been called up to the Algeria national football team.

SUMMARY: Teddy Boulhendi (Arabic: تيدي بولهندي; born 9 April 2001) is a footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Nice B. Born in France, he is an Algeria youth international.
